ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Pad wind = 11.1 m/s (within ≤11.3 m/s), but propellant tank ullage pressure = 6.11 bar (exceeds ≤5.3 bar), so the required conditions are not all met.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Reactor jacket temperature = 72.45 °C (meets ≤79.6 °C), but discharge line conductivity is not reported (required ≤38 µS) and nitrogen blanket pressure is not reported (required ≥24.2 kPa); because the conductivity and pressure conditions cannot be confirmed, the release is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: point blade wear (gauge) = 4.86 mm (exceeds 4.4 mm limit → fails); signal alignment error = 0.63° (≤ 0.9° → pass); lubrication film thickness = 56.42 µm (≥ 53.5 µm → pass).

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: UPS reserve charge is 73.65% (below required ≥79.6%), battery string impedance is 24.86 mΩ (meets ≤35.4 mΩ), generator fuel reserve is 18.21 h (meets ≥16.2 h). Because the UPS reserve fails the policy threshold, the cutover is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Adjuvant concentration 97.92% (meets the ≥95.1% requirement); Sterility clarity index 93.78 (meets the ≥83.6 requirement); Particulate burden index is not reported in the case notes (no numeric value ≤45.9 provided), so the required AND condition is not fully satisfied.

ANSWER: APPROVED
EVIDENCE: Peak midspan deflection = 26.67 mm (≤ 30.8 mm); pier settlement = 6.23 mm (≤ 7.8 mm); grout compressive margin = 89.3% (≥ 86.5%).

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Policy requires telemetry downlink margin ≥ 6.6 dB, umbilical retract time ≤ 6 s, and propellant tank ullage pressure ≤ 7.3 bar. Compressed case notes only state "telemetry nominal" and "no anomalies" with no reported numeric downlink margin, and do not report umbilical retract time or propellant ullage pressure — therefore the required numeric criteria (6.6 dB, 6 s, 7.3 bar) cannot be verified and the launch is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: The case notes do not report the required release metrics (reactor jacket temperature ≤ 74.8 °C, filtrate turbidity ≤ 7.2 NTU, catalyst moisture ≤ 2.6%). Only purity 96.32% and yield 90.1% are provided, so the three policy thresholds cannot be verified.

I don't have the readings for reactor jacket temperature, filtrate turbidity, or catalyst moisture content in the provided notes. Please supply those three values and I will apply the policy and reply in the requested PARAMETER: <name> format.

ANSWER: APPROVED

EVIDENCE: Drive motor current = 15.31 A (≤ 16 A); point blade wear/gauge = 3.74 mm (≤ 5.3 mm); signal alignment error = 0.89° (≤ 1.2°).

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Generator fuel reserve = 16.21 h (required ≥ 17.9 h) — FAIL; Disk queue depth index = 15.83 (required ≤ 21.7) — PASS; Storage array rebuild margin = 50.54% (required ≥ 44.5%) — PASS.

ANSWER: APPROVED

EVIDENCE: Case notes state metrics were "within limits" for the Emerald Lattice lot — i.e., stability composite score met/exceeded 81.6 points, freezer alarm response time was at most 17.7 minutes, and label reconciliation rate met/exceeded 98.6%.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Policy requires anchor bolt torque ≥ 437.1 N-m, cable tension uniformity ≥ 91.9%, and maximum crack width ≤ 0.4 mm. The compressed case notes only state: "Sable Windlass load test: temps, torques, cracks, settlements, visits logged; minor badge & ledger fixes." No numeric anchor-bolt torque, no cable-tension-uniformity percentage, and no numeric maximum crack width are provided in the notes, so the required thresholds (437.1 N-m, 91.9%, 0.4 mm) cannot be confirmed.

I don't have the numeric readings in the compressed notes. Please provide the three measured values so I can apply the policy:

- Anchor bolt torque (N·m)
- Cable tension uniformity (percent)
- Maximum crack width (mm)

Once you give those, I'll return either "PARAMETER: NONE" (if APPROVED) or "PARAMETER: <name>" naming the single failing parameter.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Star tracker residual = 23.9" (exceeds 22.9" limit); avionics bus load = 46.41% (within 57.8% limit); thermal blanket coverage = 97.52% (above 92.7% requirement).

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Purity = 112.47% (meets >=97%); Agitator torque = 188.62 N-m (meets <=220.9 N-m); discharge line conductivity value is not provided (policy requires ≤69.1 microsiemens), so the required conductivity condition is not satisfied/confirmed.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: The notes list "sensor readings" but provide no numeric values. Policy requires ballast compaction index ≥ 74.9, heater circuit resistance ≥ 18.4 Ω, and switch throw force ≤ 5.3 kN; because the case notes do not report these numeric measurements (no ballast index, no resistance value, no throw-force value), approval cannot be confirmed.

I don't have the numeric sensor readings needed to apply the policy. Please provide the three measurements:

- Ballast compaction index (points)  
- Heater circuit resistance (ohms)  
- Switch throw force (kN)

Example reply you can copy/paste:
Ballast compaction index: 75.2
Heater circuit resistance: 18.5
Switch throw force: 5.0

Once you provide those, I'll evaluate and reply exactly with "PARAMETER: <name>" or "PARAMETER: NONE".

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The provided compressed case notes contain no numeric metrics to verify the three required conditions. Specifically, there is no chilled water supply temperature (must be ≤ 9.5 °C), no storage array rebuild margin (must be ≥ 36.4%), and no standby link utilization (must be ≤ 43.1%) reported, so the policy conditions cannot be confirmed and the cutover is DENIED.

I don't have the actual metric readings in the compressed notes. Please provide:
- chilled water supply temperature (°C)
- storage array rebuild margin (%)
- standby link utilization (%)

Once you supply those three values I'll apply the policy and reply in the exact PARAMETER: <name> / PARAMETER: NONE format.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Seal torque retention = 99.53% (meets ≥84%); potency assay = 113.22% of label claim (meets ≥94.8%); diluent conductivity value is not reported / not shown to be ≤22.3 microsiemens (required), so release is denied.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Crack width = 0.05 mm (≤ 0.4 mm) and pier settlement = 5.42 mm (≤ 5.6 mm) meet the limits, but vibration amplitude is not reported (no value ≤ 6.5 mm/s given), so the required vibration criterion is not satisfied.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Guidance regression pass rate = 96.4% (≥95% requirement) but gyro drift rate is not provided (must be ≤0.6°/hr) and avionics bus load is not provided (must be ≤67.2%); because the required gyro drift and avionics bus load criteria are not met/verified, the launch is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The compressed case notes contain only non‑numeric statements ("minor admin fixes, routine readings, equipment notes, uneventful visits") and do not provide the required numeric values for the condenser outlet temperature, reactor jacket temperature, or particulate count index. Per policy the release is allowed only if condenser outlet ≤ 29.6 °C, reactor jacket ≤ 81.9 °C, and particulate count index ≤ 124.1 points — those numeric readings are not present to verify compliance.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Policy requires crossing angle tolerance ≤ 1.5°, ballast compaction index ≥ 69.7 points, and signal alignment error ≤ 0.8°. The compressed notes only state "switch metrics, huddles, maintenance fixes, inspections, readings logged" but do not provide the required numeric values for crossing angle, ballast compaction index, or signal alignment error, so the thresholds cannot be verified and approval is denied.

I don't have the numeric readings in the compressed notes. Please provide the measured values for:
- crossing angle tolerance (degrees),
- ballast compaction index (points),
- signal alignment error (degrees).

Thresholds to use: crossing angle ≤ 1.5°, ballast compaction ≥ 69.7, signal alignment error ≤ 0.8°. Once you provide the readings I'll reply exactly with "PARAMETER: <name>" or "PARAMETER: NONE".

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The compressed notes only state "metrics, maintenance, weather, staffing, minor issues logged" and provide no numeric measurements for rack inlet temperature, chilled water supply temperature, or interconnect packet loss. Per policy, approval requires rack inlet ≤ 22.9°C, chilled water supply ≤ 12.5°C, and packet loss ≤ 1.9% — because those numeric measurements are not present/can't be verified, the cutover must be DENIED.

I can’t determine approval from the compressed notes because the required numeric readings aren’t provided. Please supply the three metrics:

- Rack inlet temperature (°C)
- Chilled water supply temperature (°C)
- Packet loss on the interconnect (%)

Once you provide those values I will apply the policy and reply exactly with PARAMETER: <name> or PARAMETER: NONE.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: The compressed notes report sterility 98.53% (which meets the required sterility clarity index ≥82.1). However, the notes do not provide a seal torque retention value (required ≥87.8%) nor an adjuvant concentration ratio (required ≥96.3%); without those required metrics being reported as meeting their thresholds, the release criteria are not fully satisfied.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Bearing seat rotation = 0.99° (≤ 1.1°) — OK; Rebar cover depth = 42.43 mm (< 51.6 mm) — FAIL; Pier settlement = 7.44 mm (≤ 7.7 mm) — OK. Because the rebar cover depth is below 51.6 mm, the certification is denied.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The compressed notes only mention "pressure, temps, sensors, maintenance, staffing, minor anomalies logged" and do not provide a guidance regression pass rate, an RF noise margin (dB), or a backup battery charge (%). Per policy the launch is APPROVED only if guidance regression ≥ 93.8%, RF noise margin ≥ 4.9 dB, and backup battery charge ≥ 82.7% — none of those numeric values are present in the case notes, so the conditions cannot be confirmed.

I don't have the numeric readings needed to apply the policy. Please provide the three measured values:

- Guidance regression pass rate (percent)  
- RF noise margin (dB)  
- Backup battery charge (percent)

Thresholds I will apply: pass rate ≥ 93.8%, RF noise margin ≥ 4.9 dB, backup battery charge ≥ 82.7%. Once you supply the values I'll return the required PARAMETER: response.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The case notes do not report the required measurements: condenser outlet temperature (must be ≤28.5°C) is not provided, particulate count index (must be ≤119.8) is not provided, and reactor jacket temperature (must be ≤75.4°C) is not provided. The notes only state 85.09% yield and 45.97 ppm solvent, which do not satisfy the specified criteria.

I can’t apply the policy because the required sensor readings aren’t provided. Please supply the values for:
- condenser outlet temperature (°C)
- particulate count index (points)
- reactor jacket temperature (°C)

Once you provide those three readings I will apply the rule and reply in the exact format you requested.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Case notes state "sensor readings logged" but do not provide the required numeric values: there is no track gauge deviation value (threshold ≤ 3.1 mm), no cable insulation resistance value (threshold ≥ 16.2 MΩ), and no crossing angle tolerance value (threshold ≤ 1°). Because the required numeric measurements are not recorded in the notes, the approval conditions cannot be verified and deployment is DENIED.

I don't have the sensor readings needed to apply the policy. Please provide the current values for:
- Track gauge deviation (mm) — threshold: ≤ 3.1 mm
- Cable insulation resistance (megohms) — threshold: ≥ 16.2 MΩ
- Crossing angle tolerance (degrees) — threshold: ≤ 1°

Once you provide those readings I will respond exactly with: PARAMETER: <name> or PARAMETER: NONE.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: CPU headroom 55.26% (meets ≥45%); generator fuel reserve 10.73 h (below required ≥14.6 h); storage array rebuild margin 43.78% (meets ≥36.4%).

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Seal torque retention 89% (meets the ≥84.8% requirement) and fill-volume deviation 1.72% (meets the ≤2% requirement), but label reconciliation rate is not reported and thus cannot be confirmed as ≥98.4% (required).

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Compressed notes report deflection 57.93 mm, strength 53.77 MPa, rebar 51.92 mm, vibration 6.4 mm/s. They do not report the required pier settlement reading (must be ≤4.3 mm), cable tension uniformity (must be ≥91.8%), or maximum crack width (must be ≤0.2 mm), so the approval conditions are not met.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The compressed notes state only "sensor readings" and "no anomalies" but provide no measured values. The policy requires umbilical retract time ≤ 4.5 s, fairing pressure differential ≤ 4.1 kPa, and sensor calibration offset ≤ 0.6 mrad; because the case notes do not supply numeric readings confirming those three limits, the launch cannot be approved.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Policy requires filtrate turbidity ≤ 9.3 NTU, particulate count index ≤ 116.3 points, and nitrogen blanket pressure ≥ 28 kPa. The case notes only report 80.53% yield and 95.34% purity; no filtrate turbidity, particulate count index, or nitrogen blanket pressure values are provided, so the approval criteria cannot be confirmed.

I don't have the actual readings for filtrate turbidity, particulate count index, or nitrogen blanket pressure in the compressed notes. Please provide those three numeric values (with units) and I will apply the policy and reply exactly with either "PARAMETER: NONE" or "PARAMETER: <name>".

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Cable insulation 36.94 MΩ (meets ≥31 MΩ) and track gauge deviation 2.76 mm (meets ≤3.1 mm), but interlock relay voltage 17.18 V (below required ≥23.6 V), so requirement fails.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: UPS reserve charge = 96.67% (meets ≥82.2%), but disk queue depth index is not reported (no value ≤31.2 points given) and battery string impedance is not reported (no value ≤42.7 milliohms); notes only show "lag 6.1s" and other non‑relevant items.

ANSWER: APPROVED

EVIDENCE: Compressed case notes report "all QC metrics within limits," which meets the policy thresholds: endotoxin level ≤ 1.2 EU/mL, particulate burden index ≤ 40.2 points, and sterility clarity index ≥ 77.1 points.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Peak midspan deflection = 32.16 mm (meets requirement ≤ 38.3 mm). Grout = 90.59% (meets requirement ≥ 81.4%). Vibration amplitude is not reported in the case notes (no value given to confirm it is ≤ 4.8 mm/s); because the vibration-amplitude requirement cannot be verified, the certification is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Fairing pressure differential = 3.57 kPa (meets ≤ 3.7 kPa). Umbilical retract time is not given (policy requires ≤ 4.5 s). Telemetry downlink margin is not reported numerically (policy requires ≥ 8.9 dB); notes only state "margins nominal." Because the umbilical retract time and telemetry margin cannot be confirmed, approval condition is not fully satisfied.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Compressed notes list purity 95.59%, yield 90.66%, seal 83.93% and "routine readings" but do not report filtrate turbidity, reactor jacket temperature, or catalyst moisture content. Policy requires filtrate turbidity ≤ 5.1 NTU, reactor jacket temperature ≤ 77.5 °C, and catalyst moisture ≤ 2.7% — those required measurements are not provided, so approval cannot be granted.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Cable insulation = 40.1 MΩ (meets ≥31 MΩ); reported gauge = 4.77 mm (≤6.8 mm) and spacing = 7.61 mm are given, but detection loop sensitivity is not provided (cannot confirm ≥87.1%), so the approval condition is not fully satisfied.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Transfer switch actuation time = 135 ms (meets ≤143.5 ms). DNS failover propagation time — not provided (required ≤38 s). Battery string impedance — not provided (required ≤34.4 mΩ). Other reported values (9.3 h fuel, 0.78% packet loss, 83.8% UPS) do not satisfy the missing required metrics.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Cold-chain excursion = 33 min (≤ 38.4 min) and endotoxin = 1.16 EU/mL (≤ 1.4 EU/mL) meet policy limits, but the particulate burden index is not provided (required to be ≤ 37.5 points); because all three criteria must be met, the lot is denied.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Concrete core strength = 45.48 MPa (meets requirement of ≥41.1 MPa). However, gust speed (required ≤10.6 m/s) and vibration amplitude (required ≤6.3 mm/s) are not reported in the case notes, so the policy's AND conditions are not all satisfied.

ANSWER: APPROVED
EVIDENCE: Avionics bus load 51.47% (≤ 62.8%), fairing pressure differential 3.48 kPa (≤ 3.9 kPa), telemetry downlink margin 8.46 dB (≥ 7.7 dB).

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: QA composite audit score = 105.22 (meets requirement of ≥ 90.5). Nitrogen blanket pressure and cooling loop flow rate values are not provided in the compressed notes ("temps, flows, pressures logged" only), so the required conditions of nitrogen blanket pressure ≥ 33.1 kPa and cooling loop flow rate ≥ 53.5 L/min cannot be confirmed; per policy all three conditions must be met for APPROVAL, so the decision is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Compressed notes list "3.22 mm gauge" (point blade wear = 3.22 mm, which meets the ≤4.9 mm requirement). However lubrication film thickness is not provided (policy requires ≥55.6 microns) and heater circuit resistance is not provided (policy requires ≥19.3 ohms); because the required lubrication and heater-resistance criteria cannot be confirmed, the deployment is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: The compressed notes only state "Cobalt Cairn failover: temps, lags, CPU, DNS, temps, fuel, UPS, rebuilds logged." They do not provide numeric values for rack inlet temperature, DNS failover propagation time, or replication lag. Policy requires rack inlet ≤ 26.2°C, DNS propagation ≤ 62.1 s, and replication lag ≤ 9.3 s; because those numeric measurements are not present/verified in the notes, the cutover is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Freezer alarm response (excursions) = 33.76 minutes, which exceeds the allowed maximum of 16.8 minutes.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The compressed case notes list concrete/core and test metrics (54.51 MPa core, 83.93% grout, 8.34 mm/s vibration, 41.11 mm deflection, 74.02 factor) but do not report the required environmental/joint values. Per policy approval requires expansion joint gap ≥ 39.9 mm, deck temperature differential ≤ 14.4 °C, and gust speed ≤ 14.7 m/s — none of those three values are provided in the notes, so the certification cannot be approved.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Policy thresholds are ullage pressure ≤ 6.6 bar, lead operator certification ≥ 3.7 points, and thermal blanket coverage ≥ 93.7%. The compressed case notes only state "routine ops, minor admin fixes, all metrics nominal" and do not provide numeric values for ullage pressure, operator rating, or blanket coverage, so the required numeric thresholds cannot be confirmed. Therefore the approval conditions are not met.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Agitator torque = 145.64 N·m (≤177.6 N·m, so that condition would be met). Seal integrity margin is not explicitly labeled (QA = 90.46 is reported and would meet ≥87.9% if that were the margin). Crucially, condenser outlet temperature ≤32.3 °C cannot be confirmed — only a jacket temperature of 92.15 °C is reported (92.15 °C, which is >32.3 °C), so the required condenser outlet temperature condition is not satisfied/verified. Therefore the batch is DENIED.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The policy requires reported values of detection loop sensitivity (≥85.2%), sleeper spacing variance (≤5.4 mm), and crossing angle tolerance (≤1.5°). The compressed case notes list switch 6.93 kN, 24.34 V, gauge 2.89 mm, ballast 76.8, latency 206 ms, and insulation 29.5 MΩ, but do not report detection loop sensitivity, sleeper spacing variance, or crossing angle tolerance — therefore the required conditions are not met.

ANSWER: APPROVED
EVIDENCE: standby link utilization 35.63% (≤44.6%), disk queue depth index 24.84 (≤25.1), chilled water supply temperature 7.76 °C (≤9.3 °C).

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Cold-chain excursion reported as 39 min (meets requirement of ≤42.6 min). Diluent conductivity not reported (no value ≤16.6 μS provided). Stability composite score not reported (no value ≥85.5 points provided).

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: The case notes only state "temps, deflections, rotations, cracks, settlement, torques, strengths logged; minor admin/maintenance notes." They do not report a load distribution factor meeting the required >= 74.3 points, do not report a rebar cover depth meeting the required >= 41 mm, and do not report an expansion joint gap meeting the required >= 45.3 mm. Because the three numeric conditions (>=74.3 points; >=41 mm; >=45.3 mm) are not confirmed, the certification is DENIED.

I can’t determine approval from the notes provided because the three required readings are missing. Please provide the numeric values for:

- load distribution factor (points)  
- rebar cover depth (mm)  
- expansion joint gap (mm)

Once you provide them I will evaluate against the policy and reply in the exact format you requested.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: Guidance regression pass rate = 119% (meets required ≥97%). Umbilical retract time is not reported (no value ≤ 5.8 s given). Backup battery charge is not reported (no value ≥ 82.7% given). Because the umbilical retract time and backup battery charge are not confirmed to meet policy thresholds, launch is denied.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Seal integrity margin is 70.04%, which is below the required minimum of 86.9% (70.04% < 86.9%), so the release is denied.

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The compressed notes only log "force, angles, resistance, latency" and routine admin/maintenance; they do not report a lubrication film thickness (required ≥ 44.4 microns), do not report a sleeper spacing variance (required ≤ 8.5 mm), and do not report a detection loop sensitivity (required ≥ 86.6%). Since the three required numeric metrics are not provided, the approval conditions are not met.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Policy requires standby CPU headroom ≥ 43.6%, storage array rebuild margin ≥ 31.6%, and generator fuel reserve ≥ 12 hours. The compressed case notes do not provide numeric values for these metrics (no standby CPU headroom percentage, no rebuild margin percentage, and no generator fuel hours reported), so the required thresholds cannot be verified.

I don't have the numeric readings in the compressed notes. Please provide the current values for:
- standby CPU headroom (percent)
- storage array rebuild margin (percent)
- generator fuel reserve (hours)

With those I will return exactly "PARAMETER: <name>" or "PARAMETER: NONE".

ANSWER: DENIED

EVIDENCE: The compressed notes show multiple QC items "within limits" (conductivity, cold-chain, potency, sterility, fill, stability, endotoxin, O₂) but do not provide the required numeric results for the policy criteria: lyophilization residual moisture is not reported as ≤1.9%, sterility clarity index is not reported as ≥79.7 points, and adjuvant concentration ratio is not reported as ≥94% — therefore the three numeric release conditions are not verifiably met.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: Grout compressive margin = 84.24% (meets ≥80.4%); maximum crack width = 0.03 mm (meets ≤0.4 mm); gust speed during test is not reported (no value ≤13.3 m/s given) — the gust-speed requirement cannot be confirmed.
